title: muhlenbergia macroura
intro: Muhlenbergia macroura, also known as Big Bluestem or Switch Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant qualities, which can help to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Muhlenbergia macroura include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
